title: kiss×sis (TV)
sourceNotes: Single 12-episode TV season (Feel, 2010); anilistAnimeId 7593 is the only TV series (the earlier 2008 "kiss×sis" is a separate 12-part OVA side-adaptation, not mapped here). Sourced from Bow Ditama's completed ecchi harem-comedy manga (AniList 33048), which finished in 2021 at 154 chapters numbered 0-153 across 25 tankobon. This is episodic gag/fanservice comedy about Keita Suminoe and his twin stepsisters Ako and Riko with no continuous story arcs; the TV anime samples scattered early chapters non-sequentially rather than following a linear arc, so the per-episode chapter boundaries below are coarse approximations, not exact matches. A reader finishing the anime continues roughly from mid-series onward to the finale at ch. 153. No theatrical films exist (only the OVA line).

mappings.arc: Keita & the Twins (episodic ecchi gags; approximate)
